relations.note: Type scale line-heights satisfy the 150% minimum accessibility rule.
The px scale realizes the required visual hierarchy.

quotes: Email font stack (CSS):** `'Nunito Sans', Verdana, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif`
Agenda may be used as live text in digital for the campaign headline only
Nunito Sans must be loaded via `@font-face`/Google Fonts link where the client supports it

rules.intent: Ensure consistent web-safe typography with graceful fallback across email clients.
rules.rule_text: The email font stack (font.email.stack = 'Nunito Sans', Verdana, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif) is used for all email text. Nunito Sans must be loaded via @font-face/Google Fonts link where the client supports it; the stack guarantees graceful fallback in Outlook and other clients that strip webfonts. Digital headlines/headers use Nunito Sans in bolder weights (Title Case); Agenda may be used as live text in digital for the campaign headline only.

quotes: 16px is the brand-mandated minimum for body copy ("bigger is better")
Never set running text below 12px. (ISI sizing is owned by the locked component.)
must be "noticeably smaller" than primary data and clearly separated from it

rules.intent: Establish a consistent, accessible type scale with a mandated minimum body and running-text size.
rules.rule_text: Email type scale (px / line-height): H1 section hero headline 28px/36px (≈130%) Nunito Sans ExtraBold or Bold; H2 section heading 22px/30px (≈136%) Nunito Sans Bold; H3 subhead 18px/26px (≈144%) Nunito Sans Bold or SemiBold; Body 16px/24px (150%) Nunito Sans Regular — 16px is the brand-mandated minimum for body copy ("bigger is better"); Secondary/supporting body 14px/21px (150%) Nunito Sans Regular, use sparingly, never for primary content; Footnote/reference text within a section 12px/18px (150%) — must be "noticeably smaller" than primary data and clearly separated from it. Never set running text below the minimum 12px (size.text.min_running); ISI sizing is owned by the locked component.

quotes: Line height: minimum 150% for all body copy
**Line height: minimum 150% for all body copy** (brand accessibility rule). **For light text on dark backgrounds, increase further** — [GENERAL] use 160% (e.g., 16px/26px).

rules.intent: Maintain legibility and accessibility of body copy across backgrounds.
rules.rule_text: Line height must be a minimum of 150% for all body copy (brand accessibility rule). For light text on dark backgrounds, increase further — use 160% (e.g., 16px/26px).

quotes: Use a clear **type scale / visual hierarchy** so the reader knows what to read first, next, last. Never use two adjacent text blocks at the same size+weight to signal different hierarchy levels.

rules.rule_text: Use a clear type scale / visual hierarchy so the reader knows what to read first, next, last. Never use two adjacent text blocks at the same size+weight to signal different hierarchy levels.
